Question: Find gcd(36, 46)

[deduce] Divide 46 by 36

[calculate] 46 = 1 × 36 + 10

[deduce] Divide 36 by 10

[calculate] 36 = 3 × 10 + 6

[deduce] Divide 10 by 6

[calculate] 10 = 1 × 6 + 4

[deduce] Divide 6 by 4

[calculate] 6 = 1 × 4 + 2

[deduce] Divide 4 by 2

[calculate] 4 = 2 × 2 + 0

[verify] Remainder is 0, stop

[conclude] gcd(36, 46) = 2
